_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of local specialized system requirements (e.g., critical infrastructure/control systems that may not use standard information technology [IT]) for safety, performance, and reliability).
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of AI system documentation standards, including model cards, system cards, datasheets for datasets, and the evaluation evidence standards required for regulatory conformity assessment.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI RM domain. RM-K-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-K-005 (SP, cosine: 0.566), AG-K-013 (AG, cosine: 0.561).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.7/10 (raw 0.466). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, system]. DCWF-only terms [control, critical, information, infrastructure, local, performance] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, assessment, cards, conformity, datasets, datasheets] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.855 (P=0.850, R=0.861). Balanced P/R — the 23-word DCWF element and 24-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (95.5%). Despite 'Superset of' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Knowledge of local specialized system requirements (e.g., critical infrastructur" and "Knowledge of AI system documentation standards, including model cards, system ca". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.567 > STS 0.466 (gap +0.101). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge, system] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.5%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, system]. DCWF-only: [control, critical, information, infrastructure, local, performance]. WIDAI-only: [ai, assessment, cards, conformity, datasets, datasheets].
